seoTitle: NHCS Calendar 2026-2027: Dates, Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the New Hanover County Schools 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 24 first day, Jun 4 last day, holidays, breaks, teacher workdays, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: This page covers the NHCS traditional student calendar. Routine staff-only labels are simplified unless they affect student attendance.

alternateCalendars.label: 2026-2027 Isaac Bear Early College High School
2026-2027 Wilmington Early College High School and Southeast Area Technical High School

calendarFaqs.q: When does NHCS start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: New Hanover County Schools traditional-calendar students start school on Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is NHCS Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the NHCS 2026-2027 traditional calendar runs Thursday, March 25 through Friday, April 2, 2027. Students return Monday, April 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does NHCS have a half day in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 New Hanover County Schools traditional calendar lists June 4, 2027 as the last day and a half day for students.

customSections.label: Important NHCS Dates Parents Search For
customSections.content: These are the traditional-calendar dates most families check first when planning the 2026-2027 school year.

groups.label: Quick answers
items: First day of school: Monday, August 24, 2026.
Winter Break ends Friday, January 1, 2027, and students return Monday, January 4, 2027.
Spring Break runs Thursday, March 25 through Friday, April 2, 2027.
The final student day is Friday, June 4, 2027, and the traditional calendar marks it as a half day.

yearNumbers.label: Additional No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes Labor Day, October 26 Designated Teacher Workday, November 3 Election Day / Undesignated Teacher Workday, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, January 19 Designated Teacher Workday, February 15 Undesignated Teacher Workday, and Memorial Day. Break periods and the last-day half day are excluded.

yearNumbers.label: Student Half Days
yearNumbers.detail: The traditional calendar marks June 4 as the last day and a half day for students.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first day moves from August 26 in 2025-2026 to August 24 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from June 5 in 2025-2026 to June 4 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break moves from April 3-10 in 2025-2026 to March 25-April 2 in 2026-2027.
The traditional calendar lists June 4 as the last day and a half day for students.

events.name: No School (Election Day / Undesignated Teacher Workday)
Last Day of School — Half Day
